user.title: Connect to TP-Link Range Extender
user.description: Define the basic cryptographic parameters necessary to establish a web session (stok).

data.username: Administrator Account (leave as admin in 90% of cases)

error.cannot_connect: IP routing failure. The router rejected communication (Timeout). Check your subnet.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. RSA/AES key exchange failed with the provided password.
error.unknown: Critical error during asynchronous request handling.

abort.already_configured: This specific TP-Link network device is already present in Home Assistant's Device Registry.
